description: eval with $(sed ...) command substitution extracts and executes Bash function code from hooks/simplify-ignore.sh at runtime; a compromised source file would execute silently during test runs
suggested_fix: Refactor test to source the script directly or extract filter_file into a shared library file that can be safely sourced without eval

description: curl -sI makes outbound HEAD request to user-agent-supplied URL without domain allowlist; could be used for SSRF or probing internal network services
suggested_fix: Validate URL scheme is https and restrict to non-private IP ranges before invoking curl; add --max-redirs 0 to suppress redirect following

description: curl -sI -L follows HTTP redirects to user-agent-supplied URL without redirect-target validation; redirect chain could reach internal services
suggested_fix: Add URL validation before curl call; use --max-redirs 3 or 0; log the final resolved URL for auditability

description: $CONTENT (full text of SKILL.md) is interpolated into a bare heredoc JSON string without escaping; double-quotes or backslashes in the skill file produce malformed JSON output delivered to Claude Code
suggested_fix: Use jq -n --arg msg "$CONTENT" '{"priority":"IMPORTANT","message":$msg}' for properly escaped JSON construction

description: Arbitrary web content received from WebFetch is written to .claude/sdd-cache/*.json without content-type or size validation; a large or crafted response could fill disk or embed instruction-like text in cached files
suggested_fix: Add max-content-size guard (e.g., skip caching if ${#CONTENT} exceeds 512 KB) and log a warning when skipping

description: Agent frontmatter has no model field; the executor cannot select an appropriate model tier without it
suggested_fix: Add model: claude-sonnet-4-5 (or appropriate tier) to the YAML frontmatter

description: Only one example present (the output template); agents benefit from at least two examples showing different invocation contexts
suggested_fix: Add a second example showing a concrete invocation scenario, e.g. reviewing a specific auth module

description: Agent frontmatter has no model field; executor cannot select model tier without it
suggested_fix: Add model: claude-sonnet-4-5 to frontmatter

description: Only one example present (the output template); a second example showing a Prove-It pattern invocation would improve usability
suggested_fix: Add a second example block showing bug-reproduction test design

description: Agent frontmatter has no model field
suggested_fix: Add model: claude-sonnet-4-5 to frontmatter

description: Only one example block (the output template); a second example demonstrating a specific axis finding would strengthen the spec
suggested_fix: Add a second example block showing a concrete review with a Critical and a Suggestion finding

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field; the harness cannot restrict tool access for this command
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Write] or the minimal set required by the planning workflow

description: Command has no handling for the case where no spec or task context exists; invoking it cold produces undefined behavior
suggested_fix: Add an opening guard: if no SPEC.md or equivalent is found, prompt the user to run /spec first

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Agent] at minimum, since ship.md spawns subagents

description: Command does not handle the case where there are no staged changes or recent commits to review
suggested_fix: Add a guard that checks for staged or recent changes and exits with a message if none are found

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Write] for spec file creation

description: No handling for empty $ARGUMENTS; the command should prompt for the project description if none is provided
suggested_fix: Add: if no arguments provided, ask the user to describe what they want to build

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Bash] for reading diffs and running lint

description: No handling for the case where there are no staged or recent changes to review
suggested_fix: Add a guard that exits with a clear message if git status shows nothing to review

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Edit, Write, Bash] for implementation tasks

description: No handling for missing plan or empty task list
suggested_fix: Add a guard: if tasks/plan.md or tasks/todo.md does not exist, prompt to run /plan first

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Edit, Write, Bash] for writing and running tests

description: No handling for the case where no test framework is configured or no tests exist yet
suggested_fix: Add guidance for the no-existing-tests case and direct the user to set up a test framework

description: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Edit, Bash] for simplification and test running

description: No handling for empty scope; if invoked with no recent changes and no specified target, scope is undefined
suggested_fix: Add: if no scope specified, default to recently changed files from git status and state the assumption explicitly

description: "significant" used 3 times without measurable criteria (e.g., significant architectural decision, significant technical decisions, significant choices); readers cannot determine when the threshold is met
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria: e.g., "a decision that would take more than one sprint to reverse" or "a decision affecting more than one module"

description: "unnecessary" (×2) and "significantly" used without measurable thresholds; e.g., "unnecessary re-renders" and "bundle size hasn't increased significantly"
suggested_fix: Anchor to numbers: "more than 2 re-renders per interaction" or "bundle size increase >5%"

description: "relevant" used 3+ times without specifying how to determine relevance (e.g., "the relevant documentation page", "relevant section")
suggested_fix: Replace with: "the documentation page for the specific API or feature being implemented"

description: "relevant" used 3+ times without measurable criteria (e.g., "relevant source files", "relevant spec section")
suggested_fix: Define relevance: "files that are directly imported by or export to the file being modified"

description: Optional bash command references /mnt/skills/user/idea-refine/scripts/idea-refine.sh — an absolute path that only resolves in plugin-mount environments; running from repo root fails silently
suggested_fix: Use a relative path comment or note that this path is only valid when the plugin is installed via claude plugin install
